text:
Being here, I am struck by the sense of purposeful engagement that surrounds me. The first image reveals a scene of thoughtful concentration and collective endeavor, as though knowledge is both shared and generated in real time. The transparency of the glass signifies openness, yet also hints at boundaries—between observer and participant.

Moving to the second space, I feel invigorated by the vivid, vibrant colors and the intellectual playfulness suggested by "R+D." It embodies curiosity and innovation. The overlapping texts and displays invite lingering, contemplation, and question the very nature of research—not as a solitary pursuit, but as a deeply interconnected collective process. Here, I am both witness and contributor to the evolving conversation of ideas.
